post.subject: Here I Am
post.body: Yea i thought you know, since everyone else has one, I want one too! Here it is, and here i am. I have given into the invasion of anonymity and privacy that is Blogging! I guess it aint that bad since the only people who can actually see this are my 'friends'. Then it seems really pointless. Maybe i need more friends. Just so i can tell them all my private stuff? Nah ... ach well. Im here anyway, lets see how long this lasts. Im not sure how interesting this will ever be i dont really do much of great interest. And if its that interesting... it will probably be illegal or something that i wont actally want anyone to read. I dont have much to say now ... Im in a reasonable mood i guess. I should get on with some more work in a minute i think, tidy my room, and if i was really good i would do the hoovering as i was asked to do earlier... but im not so i'll do it tomorrow, maybe. Ach this is all i can really think of for now. Im listening to Everclear ... now Megadeth. I dont want to listen to Megadeth right now... lets see. OK i'm in the mood for The Pixies - Monkey Gone to Heaven, good song! Here's a pic i took today of my bro walkin up the stairs. I love the way the light shines though the window!
